title: The One with the Proposal

jokes.text: You should know, you bought like a billion of them.
jokes.setup: Someone admiring an engagement ring
jokes.punchline: Implying the person has a history of failed engagements
jokes.explanation: Quick, snappy comeback with good economy. Sets up character's romantic history efficiently.

jokes.text: You didn't get one.
jokes.setup: Discussion about engagement rings
jokes.punchline: Blunt observation highlighting someone's lack of romantic success
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective burn. Maximum impact with minimum words.

jokes.text: She'll know how expensive it is.
jokes.setup: Chandler planning romantic proposal with champagne
jokes.punchline: Revealing his shallow understanding of romance
jokes.explanation: Classic Chandler moment - thinks materialism equals romance. Good character work.

jokes.text: You'll mess up. Let me do it.
jokes.setup: Chandler explaining his proposal plan
jokes.punchline: Joey's misplaced confidence in his own abilities
jokes.explanation: Classic Joey overconfidence despite being the least qualified person for the job.

jokes.text: If she says no, can I have the ring?
jokes.setup: Discussion of proposal going well
jokes.punchline: Joey's opportunistic thinking about failure
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey logic - already thinking about the upside of his friend's potential romantic disaster.

jokes.text: -Give it. -It's gone.
jokes.setup: Monica demanding something urgently
jokes.punchline: Whatever she wanted has already disappeared
jokes.explanation: Monica's controlling nature meets immediate defeat. Very economical.

jokes.text: We're practically kissing.
jokes.setup: Two people in uncomfortably close proximity
jokes.punchline: Acknowledging the awkward intimacy of the moment
jokes.explanation: Simple observational humor about personal space violation.

jokes.text: I get mad when Rachel doesn't remember where we're going.
jokes.setup: Ross criticizing Monica and Chandler for forgetting dinner plans
jokes.punchline: Ross revealing his own petty relationship complaints
jokes.explanation: Ross's neurotic tendencies showing through his criticism of others.

jokes.text: I can do that for the kids.
jokes.setup: Learning about open bar at charity event
jokes.punchline: Joey pretending his drinking habit is charitable
jokes.explanation: Joey finding selfless justification for selfish behavior - classic character comedy.

jokes.text: You could give back the money you owe me.
jokes.setup: Joey talking about giving money back to charity
jokes.punchline: Chandler pointing out Joey owes him money
jokes.explanation: Good callback setup to Joey's financial irresponsibility. Clean structure.

jokes.text: Okay. Have a benefit.
jokes.setup: Chandler asking for money back
jokes.punchline: Joey dismissing debt with fake generosity
jokes.explanation: Joey's casual dismissal of financial responsibility. Great economy.

jokes.text: You're already doing your part for the kids.
jokes.setup: Ross saying he can't come to charity event because he has plans with Elizabeth
jokes.punchline: Implying dating a young woman is charity work for children
jokes.explanation: Sharp wordplay connecting Ross's age-gap relationship to charity for kids.

jokes.text: All jokes aside? I didn't agree to that.
jokes.setup: Someone asking for serious conversation with 'all jokes aside'
jokes.punchline: Chandler refusing to stop making jokes
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler meta-joke about his own nature. Self-aware and character-specific.

jokes.text: Thought you were making jokes. I had no idea.
jokes.setup: Learning everyone seriously disapproves of his relationship
jokes.punchline: Ross's genuine shock at the criticism
jokes.explanation: Ross's obliviousness to how inappropriate his relationship appears.

jokes.text: Not what she said last night.
jokes.setup: Ross saying he's dating Elizabeth, not his friends
jokes.punchline: Joey implying sexual encounter with Elizabeth
jokes.explanation: Predictable 'your mom' style joke but delivered at perfect moment.

jokes.text: See, now he could date her.
jokes.setup: Joey making inappropriate comment about Elizabeth
jokes.punchline: Chandler suggesting Joey's immaturity makes him age-appropriate
jokes.explanation: Sharp comeback turning Joey's inappropriate joke against him.

jokes.text: Will you marry me?
jokes.setup: Someone practicing proposal
jokes.punchline: Presumably awkward practice delivery
jokes.explanation: Basic practice proposal moment - setup for bigger payoffs later.

jokes.text: Hey, you marry me.
jokes.setup: Hearing proposal practice
jokes.punchline: Casual counter-proposal
jokes.explanation: Casual response to romantic proposal practice deflates the moment.

jokes.text: What's going on, little elves?
jokes.setup: Monica entering to find friends gathered
jokes.punchline: Condescending nickname for the group
jokes.explanation: Monica's controlling nature expressed through infantilizing nickname.

jokes.text: I know what a silent auction is. What's going on with your hair?
jokes.setup: Someone explaining silent auction concept
jokes.punchline: Monica abruptly changing subject to critique appearance
jokes.explanation: Classic Monica bluntness - dismissing explanation to focus on appearance criticism.

jokes.text: -And I also brought my friend Joey. -Shrimp toast!
jokes.setup: Chandler introducing Joey professionally
jokes.punchline: Joey immediately distracted by food
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey moment - completely derailing professional introduction for food.

jokes.text: You know, I don't know where he is.
jokes.setup: Joey running off for food during introduction
jokes.punchline: Chandler's embarrassed damage control
jokes.explanation: Standard embarrassed friend reaction beat.

jokes.text: Okay, $20.
jokes.setup: Discussing bidding on expensive Paris trip
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's hilariously low bid amount
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe logic - completely disconnected from auction reality.

jokes.text: Call the police. That's what I did to kids in my building.
jokes.setup: Kids having water balloon fight
jokes.punchline: Monica's extreme overreaction to normal kid behavior
jokes.explanation: Perfect Monica neurosis - calling police on children for playing.

jokes.text: -Who drank all the kamikazes? -Nobody. We put them in here!
jokes.setup: Someone asking about missing drinks
jokes.punchline: Revealing drinks were put in water balloons
jokes.explanation: Creative escalation of water balloon fight with alcohol element.

jokes.text: Now, this is a nice suit!
jokes.setup: Water balloon fight in progress
jokes.punchline: Someone getting soaked while wearing formal attire
jokes.explanation: Basic physical comedy of formal wear getting ruined.

jokes.text: I won! That was my guess!
jokes.setup: Auction announcer stating winning bid
jokes.punchline: Joey thinking he won by guessing correctly
jokes.explanation: Perfect setup for Joey's fundamental misunderstanding of auctions. Great character work.

jokes.text: Joey, it is an auction. You don't guess. You buy!
jokes.setup: Joey celebrating his 'win'
jokes.punchline: Chandler explaining the horrible reality
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation of Joey's mistake. Chandler's exasperated explanation.

jokes.text: What?
jokes.setup: Learning he owes $20,000
jokes.punchline: Joey's stunned single-word response
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing - Joey's world collapsing in one word.

jokes.text: One nation under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all. I remembered it.
jokes.setup: Chandler trying to calm his nerves before proposal
jokes.punchline: Reciting Pledge of Allegiance as calming technique
jokes.explanation: Brilliant nervous habit - using patriotic recitation to calm proposal anxiety.

jokes.text: Because then I would be cold. If you thought you'd be cold, you should have brought a jacket.
jokes.setup: Monica asking for his jacket
jokes.punchline: Chandler's aggressively logical refusal
jokes.explanation: Chandler's nervous state making him weirdly unromantic and logical.

jokes.text: Before I met you, I had really little life.
jokes.setup: Chandler beginning romantic speech
jokes.punchline: Accidentally diminishing his pre-Monica existence
jokes.explanation: Chandler's attempt at romance coming out awkwardly honest.

jokes.text: What? I'm Chandler.
jokes.setup: Monica saying 'Oh my God, Richard'
jokes.punchline: Chandler's confused self-identification
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing - Chandler's confusion at Monica mentioning her ex during proposal.

jokes.text: Well, my nose got lonely.
jokes.setup: Monica commenting on Richard's mustache being back
jokes.punchline: Richard's whimsical explanation
jokes.explanation: Classic Richard charm - anthropomorphizing his nose to explain facial hair.

jokes.text: I'm Chandler. I make jokes when I'm uncomfortable.
jokes.setup: Chandler being awkward around Richard
jokes.punchline: Self-aware explanation of his coping mechanism
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-joke - Chandler explaining his entire character trait while demonstrating it.

jokes.text: No one's supposed to know about us!
jokes.setup: Richard introducing Monica and Chandler as people who 'used to date'
jokes.punchline: Chandler panicking about their secret relationship
jokes.explanation: Good callback to ongoing secret relationship while highlighting Chandler's panic.

jokes.text: See, I did it again.
jokes.setup: Chandler making another uncomfortable joke
jokes.punchline: Self-aware acknowledgment of his pattern
jokes.explanation: Direct callback to his meta-observation, doubling down on self-awareness.

jokes.text: I figured I'd take a guess. Help a charity. Free boat!
jokes.setup: Explaining his auction bidding logic
jokes.punchline: Joey's completely backwards understanding of charity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey logic - thinking charity means getting free stuff while helping.

jokes.text: Why would a charity give away a free boat? I don't know. Charity?
jokes.setup: Chandler questioning Joey's charity logic
jokes.punchline: Joey's circular reasoning
jokes.explanation: Joey's tautological explanation perfectly captures his confused thinking.

jokes.text: Because the more I drink, the less there is for the kids to drink.
jokes.setup: Asked how his drinking helps the kids
jokes.punchline: Joey's twisted protective logic
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Joey logic - turning drinking into child protection. Completely backwards but internally consistent.

jokes.text: Hey, I was pretty close.
jokes.setup: Learning boat was valued at $19,000 after bidding $20,000
jokes.punchline: Joey focusing on being close rather than losing $1,000
jokes.explanation: Classic Joey optimism - finding positive spin on financial disaster.

jokes.text: Joey! Joey, good one!
jokes.setup: Joey announcing he can't pay
jokes.punchline: Someone thinking it's a joke
jokes.explanation: Escalation of Joey's predicament - others not taking his financial crisis seriously.

jokes.text: They should just watch TV after school like I did. And I turned out fine. Not great.
jokes.setup: Joey questioning need for youth center
jokes.punchline: Self-awareness about his own mediocrity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey self-awareness - admitting his own shortcomings while making his point.

jokes.text: I once walked in on both my parents making love to the same guy.
jokes.setup: Sharing embarrassing parent stories
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's casually delivered shocking revelation
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe shock value - casually delivering information that recontextualizes everything about her family.

jokes.text: As a poet once said, 'In the sweetness of friendship let there be laughter and sharing of pleasures...for in the dew of little things the heart finds its morning and is refreshed.'
jokes.setup: Richard making a toast
jokes.punchline: Overly flowery, pretentious poetry
jokes.explanation: Richard's pretentious side showing - overly elaborate toast that sounds ridiculous.

jokes.text: What?
jokes.setup: Richard's pretentious poetry toast
jokes.punchline: Chandler's confused response
jokes.explanation: Perfect reaction to pretentious nonsense - simple confusion.

jokes.text: Sometimes grownups have commitments they can't get out of.
jokes.setup: Elizabeth busy with water balloon fight
jokes.punchline: Ross talking to her like a child
jokes.explanation: Ross inadvertently highlighting the age gap by talking down to Elizabeth.

jokes.text: That's what I did when I first started weighing stuff.
jokes.setup: Advice to weigh good vs bad in relationship
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's literal interpretation about weighing objects
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe misunderstanding - taking metaphorical advice literally.

jokes.text: My God. You married her, didn't you?
jokes.setup: Ross thinking seriously about his relationship
jokes.punchline: Phoebe jumping to extreme conclusion
jokes.explanation: Phoebe's tendency to jump to dramatic conclusions from minimal evidence.

jokes.text: If you're not careful, you may not get married at all this year.
jokes.setup: Ross dealing with relationship issues
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's ominous warning about marriage prospects
jokes.explanation: Dark humor about Ross's romantic prospects and timeline pressure.

jokes.text: It's a trip for two. Enchanté.
jokes.setup: Asking about Paris trip winner
jokes.punchline: Chandler's attempt at French charm
jokes.explanation: Chandler's awkward attempt at sophistication when discussing Paris.

jokes.text: It's Pam. Just imagine this. The Pam.
jokes.setup: Trying to sell boat by personalizing it
jokes.punchline: Chandler's enthusiastic but awkward sales pitch
jokes.explanation: Chandler's desperate sales technique - personalizing boat name.

jokes.text: You get all that peace and quiet you've always wanted. You get back to nature. You can go fishing. You get one of those hats, people call you captain. And then when you're old, Cappy.
jokes.setup: Chandler painting picture of boat ownership
jokes.punchline: The progression from 'captain' to 'Cappy'
jokes.explanation: Great escalating sales pitch with perfect aging nickname progression.

jokes.text: Who cares? I'll make payments! I want the Mr. Bowmont!
jokes.setup: Chandler's boat sales pitch working too well
jokes.punchline: Joey completely sold despite having no money
jokes.explanation: Joey's impulsiveness overriding financial reality - perfect character consistency.

jokes.text: I want to see what's in your hand, the trash.
jokes.setup: Monica asking to see Chandler's hand
jokes.punchline: Awkward cover story about trash
jokes.explanation: Weak cover story highlighting Monica's suspicion about the ring.

jokes.text: A palm reader, a manicurist, a hand doctor. Glove salesman. Good one!
jokes.setup: Friends suggesting cover stories for wanting to see Monica's hand
jokes.punchline: Chandler appreciating Joey's contribution
jokes.explanation: Escalating list of hand-related professions, culminating in Chandler's approval.

jokes.text: Being you is finally gonna pay off!
jokes.setup: Chandler needing to act commitment-phobic
jokes.punchline: Ross pointing out this matches Chandler's natural state
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback to Chandler's commitment issues as character trait.

jokes.text: That guy's still doing that?
jokes.setup: Monica mentioning pizza boxes in trash chute
jokes.punchline: Ross's knowing response
jokes.explanation: Mild callback to ongoing apartment building issue.

jokes.text: You suck! Breakup's still on.
jokes.setup: Ross thinking Elizabeth was being mature about breakup
jokes.punchline: Elizabeth's delayed angry reaction
jokes.explanation: Good reversal of Ross's premature celebration of mature breakup.

jokes.text: And, also, a little like a French guy.
jokes.setup: Asking if Chandler looks like he doesn't want to get married
jokes.punchline: Joey's random additional observation
jokes.explanation: Random Joey observation adding absurd detail to appearance assessment.

jokes.text: How it's a way for governments to keep tabs on you. Yeah, Big Brother.
jokes.setup: Fake conversation about marriage being unnecessary
jokes.punchline: Chandler's awkward addition of conspiracy theory
jokes.explanation: Chandler's awkward attempt to seem anti-marriage through conspiracy theories.

jokes.text: Well, that's good to know.
jokes.setup: Chandler seeming anti-marriage right before he plans to propose
jokes.punchline: Monica's suspicious response
jokes.explanation: Monica's suspicion showing through her sarcastic response.

jokes.text: The Mr. Bowmont's here!
jokes.setup: Tense moment between Monica and Chandler
jokes.punchline: Joey's excited interruption about his boat
jokes.explanation: Good timing of Joey's oblivious excitement interrupting tense moment.

jokes.text: I hate when people come back to compliment the chef. Like I've nothing better to do.
jokes.setup: Richard wanting to see Monica
jokes.punchline: Monica's professional complaints masking personal discomfort
jokes.explanation: Monica deflecting personal discomfort through professional complaints.

jokes.text: Came here to tell you I still love you.
jokes.setup: Richard's casual visit to Monica's workplace
jokes.punchline: Dropping major emotional bombshell
jokes.explanation: Major plot development delivered with casual directness. Perfect timing for episode cliffhanger.

tmdb_overview: Chandler plans dinner proposal but Richard appears. Phoebe and Joey join Rachel's silent charity auction. Ross and Elizabeth's relationship faces crisis as proposal unfolds.
